name: Batched CYK/Viterbi Parsing for CNF Grammars
gpu_optimization_points: process spans by increasing length and synchronize between length frontiers
parallelize across batch items, span starts, nonterminals, and split points
tile the nonterminal dimensions of binary rules into shared memory or cache-friendly blocks
use warp-level max reductions over split and child-nonterminal candidates
store grammar score tensors in read-only memory and reuse span charts across kernels
